title: magnolia biloba
intro: Magnolia biloba, also known as the white magnolia or fu ling, is a type of plant that belongs to the magnolia family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of magnolia biloba include improved respiratory function, reduced stress and anxiety, and enhanced immune system function. Magnolia biloba can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
